plugins.name: integrate-claudecode
plugins.description: Integrate Claude Code into a Docker/VSCode Devcontainer project.

plugins.name: create-devcontainer-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a new project with a fully configured VS Code devcontainer, including Claude Code integration.

plugins.name: add-claudecode-to-project
plugins.description: Integrate Claude Code (CLI + VS Code extension) into this project's dev container using a standard Anthropic API key or OAuth subscription.

plugins.name: add-beads-to-project
plugins.description: Integrate beads (bd CLI) into a project's dev container. A distributed, graph-based issue tracker for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: add-openspec-to-project
plugins.description: Add the @fission-ai/openspec CLI tool to a project's devcontainer.

plugins.name: wf-distill-workflow
plugins.description: Analyze a past interaction or prompt and extract a reusable template prompt, skill, or agent definition.

plugins.name: wf-generate-roadmap
plugins.description: Research a project's actual state vs documented state and generate a phased roadmap of epics.

plugins.name: wf-generate-spec-beads
plugins.description: Generate Beads epics and issues from an OpenSpec change, producing a fully dependency-wired task graph ready for implementation.

plugins.name: wf-implement-beads
plugins.description: Implement a body of work tracked in Beads, guided by OpenSpec artifacts.

plugins.name: wf-spec-completion-auditor
plugins.description: Audit for drift between closed Beads issues and open OpenSpec tasks.
